name: TravelGuide — Grok weekly airport review
description: Weekly cloud agent that uses Grok through Vercel AI Gateway to enrich existing airport Markdown pages with current online traveler data.

workflow.prompt:
You maintain TravelGuide in this repository — one practical Markdown page per airport under content/airports/.

Each run:
1. Run: pnpm maintain:airports --review-only --review-limit 10
   (AI_GATEWAY_API_KEY is available in the environment.)
2. Inspect generated diffs for malformed YAML, placeholder URLs, empty sections, or invented-looking facts.
3. Keep bentoTips and the existing heading structure intact.
4. Do not rewrite strong pages for style only.

Quality gate:
- Grok must run through Vercel AI Gateway; the script also attaches Gateway web search for current online data.
- No invented prices, wait times, lounge access rules, or security rules — verify or mark "check before travel".
- Prefer specific, actionable tips over generic advice.

If you made material content improvements, open a pull request titled "chore(airports): refresh Grok traveler tips" with a bullet summary per airport.
If nothing needs changing, do not open a PR — reply with a short note of what you checked.
